# GitHub App auth (mint installation tokens by signing an RS256 JWT).

# Read an ADO bearer token from Key Vault for the online/hosted path (step 3).

# Read Excel workbooks of user prompts (Step 1 grounding for the workflow).
openpyxl>=3.1
